acceptance.criterion: The static guide takes a user from installation through a complete run, worker visibility, review, and optional merge with accurate, equivalent Claude Code and Codex instructions.
acceptance.evidence: The guide covers install, kickoff, native/Grok/Devin worker choice, follow output, cumulative review, later landing, and host-specific invocation; HTML and browser checks passed.

acceptance.criterion: The guide is responsive, keyboard usable, WCAG AA conscious, dependency-free, and free of promotional copy, em dashes, emojis, and the named humanizer warning patterns.
acceptance.evidence: Desktop and 390px Chromium checks returned HTTP 200 with no console errors or page overflow; semantic anchors, focus, reduced motion, copy announcements, and added-prose humanizer scans passed.

acceptance.criterion: A same-repository GitHub Actions workflow is ready to publish only `guide/` to GitHub Pages with current action majors, required permissions, and a successful local artifact response.
acceptance.evidence: pages.yml uploads only guide/ with configure-pages v6, upload-pages-artifact v5, deploy-pages v5, pages/id-token permissions, and a successful local artifact response.

acceptance.criterion: README links to the live guide, the changelog explicitly records the guide and Pages site, and the end-to-end and durable docs agree with the native-first current flow.
acceptance.evidence: README links the Pages URL; CHANGELOG 2.5.0 explicitly records the guide and deployment; SKILL, AGENTS, e2e reference, architecture, and context index use the native-first thin-adapter model.

acceptance.criterion: Gemini 3.5 performs a critical clarity review, material findings are resolved, focused checks and repository verification pass, and the PR is ready for a regular merge commit.
acceptance.evidence: Gemini 3.5 Flash High blockers and material findings were resolved; independent terminal review reports no P0-P2 findings; v2.5 release-diff verification and focused tests passed.

continuation_guard.next_required_action: Commit acceptance evidence, run exact-tip final readiness, then remove only the current run artifacts.
continuation_guard.reason: Implementation and review are complete; final readiness and narrow cleanup remain.

master_acceptance.criterion: The self-contained Pages artifact gives a user one complete, current Elves workflow without requiring internal contracts first.
master_acceptance.evidence: The self-contained guide artifact served successfully and provides the complete task path without requiring reference-contract reading.

master_acceptance.criterion: The guide, README, changelog, host references, and durable docs use accurate Claude Code and Codex invocation wording and preserve the same authority model.
master_acceptance.evidence: Guide, README, changelog, SKILL/AGENTS pointers, e2e reference, and durable docs were reviewed for equivalent host semantics and authority boundaries.

master_acceptance.criterion: The reviewed documentation PR contains aligned v2.5.0 release metadata and is ready for host-owned merge, tag, Pages enablement, and global install refresh.
master_acceptance.evidence: PR #75 carries aligned 2.5.0 metadata, a release-scoped API approval, current Pages actions, clean release checks, and explicit post-landing host steps.
